code:
import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(text, "\n")
mut total = 0
mut i = 0
while i < lines.len()
  let line = lines.get(i)
  match line
  when Some(l)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(l)
    if tokens.len() >= 2
      let t = tokens.get(1)
      match t
      when Some(tok)
        let n = string.parse_int(tok)
        match n
        when Some(v)
          total = total + v
        when None
          total = total
        end
      when None
        total = total
      end
    end
  when None
    total = total
  end
  i = i + 1
end
print("sum=#{total}")
